title: althaea flava
intro: Althaea flava, also known as marsh mallow, is a perennial herb plant belonging to the Malvaceae family. It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and soothing effects due to its high mucilage content. The health benefits of Althaea flava include treating digestive issues, soothing respiratory problems, and providing relief from skin irritations and wounds. Althaea flava can be prepared as a tea, syrup, or powder, and is often used in traditional herbal remedies, such as marshmallow root tea, to promote overall well-being.
